steps.title: Expand the two parts
steps.content: First expand the square and the product: $$(x^2+11)^2=x^4+22x^2+121$$ $$(x-8)(x+8)=x^2-64.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The fitted expression is $x^4+23x^2+57$, which matches the correct answer, D. Two other options have the wrong $x^2$ coefficient, and another alternative has the wrong constant, so D is correct.
